If a magnetic flux density is larger than threshold Bop, DO is turned to sink and DOB is turned to drive.
The elevator involved in the accident did record hazardous violations in 2003, according to DOB records.
New York City's roughly 60, 000 elevators had an accident rate of less than 0.1% in 2010, a DOB spokeswoman said.
